objective: Separate mandatory financial factor applicability from explicit large_model_value_v0 strategy eligibility without inventing a financial P/S target band.
claim_ceiling: accepted E0 shared-contract repair and negative validation only; no approved financial semantics, factor implementation, strategy activation, or release-readiness claim

requirements: queued S3 registration is merged to main
the implementation PR pins its exact current main base SHA
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
an active integration lease covers the shared research contract path
issue #150 contains the exact manifest path and SHA-256

dependencies.artifact: approved financial operating-efficiency and strategy-eligibility policy

required_strata: financial issuer with a versioned target band
financial issuer with an available factor but incomparable strategy valuation
missing or unknown financial strategy behavior
canonical round-trip and distinct strategy identities

release_activation.reason: S3 repairs a provisional contract only; #59/#21 approval and later candidate acceptance remain mandatory

negative_controls: canonical identity collision between the two valid policies

invalidation: financial factor applicability or strategy eligibility vocabulary changes create a new batch revision
shared contract path lease expiry blocks the implementation PR
candidate semantic values or approvals do not raise this E0 evidence ceiling
rollback: Revert the S3 contract repair and tests together; no accepted release manifest or runtime registry may reference this provisional contract.
